scripts.test:unit: npm run codegen && npm run test:unit --workspace postgres-backup-backend && npm run test:unit --workspace postgres-backup-frontend
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm run codegen && npm run test:unit:coverage --workspace postgres-backup-backend && npm run test:unit:coverage --workspace postgres-backup-frontend
scripts.e2e:frontend-server: npm run codegen && npm run dev:e2e --workspace postgres-backup-frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run codegen && npm run compile --workspace postgres-backup-backend && npm run typecheck:test --workspace postgres-backup-backend && npm run typecheck --workspace postgres-backup-frontend
scripts.dev: npm run codegen && concurrently -k -n codegen,backend,frontend "npm run codegen:watch" "npm run dev --workspace postgres-backup-backend" "npm run dev --workspace postgres-backup-frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run codegen && concurrently -k -n codegen,backend,frontend,storybook "npm run codegen:watch" "npm run dev --workspace postgres-backup-backend" "npm run dev --workspace postgres-backup-frontend" "npm run storybook --workspace postgres-backup-frontend"
